items.title: Scientists Discover Giant Planet Formation Around Supermassive Black Holes
items.summary: New research suggests that supermassive black holes may host the formation of giant planets within their surrounding dusty disks.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Paramount Plus is two dollars for two months of ad-free viewing
items.summary: Paramount Plus is offering new and former subscribers a discounted rate until June 25th, 2026. You’ll pay 99 cents per month for the first two months, with the Premium plan auto...

items.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
items.summary: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.
